page.title: Sandbox Network Policy
page.description: Egress policy for the OpenShell sandbox. Below: outbound requests that were denied in the selected time window, and the current allow-list of endpoints in force. Read-only — rules change when the agent proposes egress via the policy advisor or a task grants it.
denials.title: Denied requests
denials.logUnavailable: The sandbox reports no denial log is available (policy logging may be off).
denials.emptyPre: No denied requests in the last
allowed.title: Allowed policy (effective allow-list)
allowed.noneParsed: No endpoints parsed — show raw policy JSON
manifest.description: Run shell commands in OpenShell-managed Docker sandboxes (NVIDIA OpenShell). Alternative to microsandbox: avoids macOS Hypervisor.framework (no idle-CPU burn on Apple Silicon Tahoe), includes network/inference policy support. MVP provides sandbox.shell only; browser sidecar and per-task pool are tracked for follow-ups.
